jd_text: Overview Job Description Program Director - GPU Deployment, Core42, Abu Dhabi - UAE About Us Core42, a leader in AI-powered cloud and digital infrastructure, is driving transformative technology solutions globally. Leveraging advanced resources and partnerships, Core42 empowers clients to harness sovereign AI infrastructure, especially in sectors with stringent regulatory needs. With a mission to redefine digital transformation, we combine sovereign capabilities with scalable, high-performance compute infrastructure, positioning itself at the forefront of AI innovation in the Middle East and beyond. The opportunity An experienced PMO / Programme Leader, with previous exposure to GPU / Cloud deployments, data centre construction, or other digital and technology capital delivery projects and portfolios. The role will require the individual to own the company‑wide PMO, for deployments within the PMO charter, ensuring they are governed, prioritised and delivered in line with Core42’s AI and sovereign‑cloud strategy. Reporting directly to the Chief Product and Technology Officer (CPTO). Responsibilities Lead and maintain the PMO framework (e.g., governance, lifecycle, templates, KPIs, RAID, change control) across all clusters. Run portfolio‑level planning and prioritization with SteerCo, aligning projects to Core42’s strategy and capacity. Own consolidated reporting: SteerCo, portfolio dashboards, benefits tracking, financials, and risk exposure across all clusters and regions (Currently: US, UAE, France). Chair PMO forums (Regional PM community, PM forums), drive standards and continuous improvement in delivery practices. Coordinate resource demand vs. capacity across clusters (PMs, schedulers, document controllers, project controllers, etc.). Ensure effective regular project reviews (initiation, business case, readiness for deployment, go‑live, closure) and escalate issues to SteerCo. Manage interfaces with support functions (Finance, Legal, Procurement, Security & Compliance) Coordination with the project development lead and regional leads to understand what leads are currently being assessed and whether available capacity across existing clusters can be utilised. Drive ‘close the gap’ activities to deliver Revenue / Profit against the budget in 2026. What Were Looking For Relevant Experience: direct experience in PMO or Programme Management, ideally with hands-on involvement in delivering impactful solutions, with circa 15 years plus experience; with at least 2 years of data centre and/or GPU experience seen as highly preferable. Technical Knowledge: Strong familiarity with managing supply chains, including experience in delivering solutions across multiple technology domains, including SaaS platforms, e-commerce ecosystems, ERP systems, CRM systems, Digital assets and content management platforms, customer experience tools, marketing automation, data and analytics platforms, API integrations, Middleware, cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure), and enterprise systems. Analytical Thinking: Ability to interpret technical and financial data, assess the impact of changes in the business models, and generate actionable insights based on thorough analysis. Detail Orientation: Strong focus on accuracy and precision. Tech & Innovation Enthusiasm: Genuine interest in technology and innovation, with a commitment to creating exceptional customer experiences. Adaptability & Problem Solving: Skilled at navigating challenges and finding effective solutions in dynamic environments. Collaborative Mindset: Comfortable working across diverse teams and functional areas, fostering an inclusive and cooperative approach. Clear Communication: Proficient in both written and verbal communication, with the ability to simplify complex concepts for different audiences. Influence & Trust Building: Capable of inspiring confidence and influencing ideas to drive positive outcomes. Organized & Agile: Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver at pace. Curiosity & Continuous Improvement: Willingness to challenge existing processes, ask thoughtful questions, and seek better ways of working. Human-Centered Approach: Prioritize the human experience when implementing improvements and driving change. Stakeholder Collaboration: Ability to partner effectively with internal teams and external stakeholders to achieve successful outcomes. Required skills / qualifications 15+ years of PMO / Programme Management experience; Degree or equivalent experience; Previous experience operating at a senior leadership level; Strong governance and portfolio management expertise; Delivered complex, multi-workstream programmes; Exceptional stakeholder management capability. Preferred skills / qualifications Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving abilities. Previous direct experience of GPU deployments Certifications: Project Management Professional (PMP), PRINCE2, or Certified ScrumMaster (CSM). In-depth knowledge of cloud platforms, including AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and G42 Cloud. Job Details Role Level: Not Applicable Work Type: Full-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Abu Dhabi Company Website: http://www.core42.ai Job Function: Management Company Industry/ Sector: IT Services and IT Consulting What We Offer About The Company Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life.
